nameMeanings.name: Birley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Birley in Ecclesfield (Yorkshire), East or North Bierley (Yorkshire), or Birley (Derbyshire).

variants.name: Burley
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Burley, for example in Hampshire, Rutland, Shropshire, and Yorkshire, from Old English burh ‘fortified manor, stronghold’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of Swiss German Bürli: from a diminutive of būr ‘peasant, farmer’ (see Bauer ).

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: Of uncertain origin. If not simply an invention, it may have been devised as a feminine equivalent of   Alan   (of which it is an anagram), or a shortened form of   Alana .  It seems to have been first used by the American film actress  Lana Turner  (  1920–1995 ), whose original name was  Julia .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

en.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Birley was born in 1495, in Gateforth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. She had at least 1 daughter with Sir John Norman. She died in 1572, in South Duffield, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 77.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Birleyは1495年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアガテフォースで生まれた。彼女はSir John Normanとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1572年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアソウス ダフィールドで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Birley(은)는 1495년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 게이테포스에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Sir John Norman(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1572년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 소우스 더필드에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.
